headline: Uber And Block Expand Payments Tie Up As Valuation Draws Attention
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) has expanded its partnership with Block, Inc., bringing Square technology to Uber Eats globally. The deal will extend Square integration for restaurants using Uber Eats in multiple international markets. In the United States, Uber users will gain Cash App Pay as a new payment option for rides and food delivery. Uber Technologies, trading at $74.64, has a mixed recent track record, with a 3.2% decline over the past week and a 2.1% return over 30 days. Over three...
